title: Supplement Stack
html:
Yahir's recurring supplement list — appears as a baseline checklist across multiple workout-planning, travel-prep, and lifting-split notes. Canonical 2024 mid-trip version: magnesium, fish oils, D3, BCAA, creatine (from 2024 08 14 travel occurrences). Sits adjacent to his lifting/fitness preoccupation flagged as a development marker in markers of development — fitness-investment is one of Yahir's society development proxy markers.

TL;DR

  • 16 inbound citations spanning 2019 → 2026 — sustained personal-discipline thread.
  • The list is stable across years: magnesium + fish oil + D3 + creatine are constants; BCAA / pre-workout / multivitamin rotate.
  • Updated formally in 2024 12 18 Building Phase Body Blueprint and 2026 04 26 pushing the limits of health choose someting have something — the "body blueprint" / "pushing the limits of health" notes are the canonical body-system docs.
  • Pairs with ISSA CPT knowledge — Yahir's fitness understanding informs his stack choices.
  • Fitness-stack thinking is the primitive that powered BroMenu / Brotein — the same mental model that ranks supplements ranks anabolic foods.

Key facts

  • 2024 mid-trip canonical list. Magnesium + fish oils + D3 + BCAA + creatine (2024 08 14 travel occurrences mid-China).
  • Body-blueprint formalization. 2024 12 18 Building Phase Body Blueprint — full body-system spec written ~2 weeks before BroMenu spec.
  • Lifting-split adjacency. 2024 02 29 workout split / 2026 02 23 new lifting split — the supplement stack lives inside the workout-split context.
  • Grocery-category sibling. 2025 02 26 grocery categories pantry — same systematizing instinct applied to whole-foods.
  • 2025 health limits push. 2026 04 26 pushing the limits of health choose someting have something — "choose something, have something" = the disposition behind supplement adherence.

Chronological arc

  • 2019-09-30 — earliest hint (2019 09 30 show dad all of the documents — adjacent doc-management).
  • 2020-05-10 — 2020 05 10 6 wake up — morning routine including supplements.
  • 2022-04-12 — 2022 04 12 instead of osig — supplement adjacency in the OSIG-divergence period.
  • 2022-12-22 — 2022 12 22 Workout 6x regiment — formal workout regiment with stack.
  • 2024-02-29 — 2024 02 29 workout split — pre-China baseline.
  • 2024-08-14 — 2024 08 14 travel occurrences — mid-China canonical list.
  • 2024-08-31 — 2024 08 31 determinants of advanced countries — pairs with markers-of-development.
  • 2024-12-18 — 2024 12 18 Building Phase Body Blueprint — formalization.
  • 2025-02-26 — 2025 02 26 grocery categories pantry — whole-foods adjacency.
  • 2025-05-04 — 2025 05 04 screenshot 2025 05 04 at 5 41 30 pm 911ffc99 — visual capture.
  • 2025-08-08 — 2025 08 08 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 08 07 at 23 21 43 e686144c — Brotein-app supplements UI.
  • 2026-02-20 / 2026-02-23 — 2026 02 20 whats left / 2026 02 23 new lifting split — current splits.
  • 2026-04-26 — 2026 04 26 pushing the limits of health choose someting have something — most recent.

  • 2024 08 14 travel occurrences — canonical 2024 list
  • 2024 12 18 Building Phase Body Blueprint — formal blueprint
  • 2026 04 26 pushing the limits of health choose someting have something — most recent

Plus ~8 cross-links from markers of development, viktor frankl, from fitness to software the brotein arc (synthesis), and travel-context summaries.
